---
title: "Nick Lewis"
about:
  template: jolla
  image: images/profile.jpg
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/ntlewis1251
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/nick-lewis-geo
---

[cite_start]Nick Lewis is a GIS Analyst and Geologist based in Richmond, VA[cite: 1, 5]. [cite_start]Currently completing a Bachelor of Arts and Sciences in Geology with a minor in Data Science at William & Mary[cite: 7].

I specialize in geotechnical engineering, spatial analysis, and Python-based geoscience workflows. [cite_start]My work focuses on the intersection of physical geology and computational methods, specifically in stream analysis and Appalachian geomorphology[cite: 21, 27].
